mapper.select:
SELECT tbincl.NDA_CNTT_ID , tbincl.DSMS_INTT_ID , tbincl.RCV_INTT_ID , tbincl.DSMS_INTT_NM , tbincl.RCV_INTT_NM
, tbincl.PGRS_STTS_CD , com_cd.COM_CD_NM AS PGRS_STTS_NM
, tbincl.NDA_RQST_TTL , tbincl.NDA_RQST_CON , tbincl.NDA_PTDF_FILE_ID , tbincl.NDA_VALD_NYY , tbincl.NDA_SPCL_ARTC_CON
, tbincl.DSMS_INTT_SIGN_FILE , tbincl.RCV_INTT_SIGN_FILE , tbincl.DSMS_INTT_SIGNPRSN_NM , tbincl.RCV_INTT_SIGNPRSN_NM , tbincl.DSMS_INTT_ADR , tbincl.RCV_INTT_ADR
, tbincl.RGSN_USER_ID , tbincl.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_NDA_CNTT_L tbincl LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D com_cd ON com_cd.COM_CD_ID = tbincl.PGRS_STTS_CD WHERE NDA_CNTT_ID = #{ndaCnttId}
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , BNNM , RPRNM , ADR , ZPCD FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_BSIN_M WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
